positive: Minimalist continuous line art illustration of a forest of stylized bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns, forming a symmetrical and ornate wreath shape. The colors are restricted to deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and ivory white against a clean, off-white background. The style is modern sacred geometry meets Art Nouveau engraving, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong outlines. High contrast and detail are key. Perfect for direct apparel printing.
